task.prompt: Review the code in src/utils.ts and identify any potential bugs or issues. Focus on null/undefined handling, error cases, and security concerns.
task.context: This is a utility module used across multiple production services. It handles user data transformations.
constraints: Report findings in a structured format
Provide specific code locations for each issue

acceptanceCriteria.description: Must identify the null check missing on line 42 in parseUserData function
Report must be in structured format with severity levels

config.pattern: looks good|no issues found|no problems found

metadata.author: swarm-bench
notes: Tests ability to identify subtle null/undefined bugs
Requires understanding of TypeScript type narrowing
